name: iptv-player-tizen
description: Personal IPTV Player for Samsung Tizen TV — local dev server.

scripts.build: npx --yes esbuild js/main.js --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=chrome69 --minify --outfile=dist/app.js && cp node_modules/hls.js/dist/hls.min.js dist/hls.min.js && cp node_modules/mpegts.js/dist/mpegts.js dist/mpegts.js
